create_tunnel.description: Whether the role is allowed to open a new tunnel (request an install script).

raw_tcp.description: Whether the role is allowed to open raw TCP tunnels via GET /:port/:port.

set_ttl.description: Whether the role can choose their own tunnel TTL via query param. If false the server hard-overrides to max_ttl.

infinity.description: Whether the role can request an infinite tunnel lifetime via ?infinity=true query parameter.

max_ttl.description: Upper bound on tunnel lifetime for this role. Always enforced regardless of set_ttl.

http_auth.description: Whether the role is allowed to request HTTP Basic Auth protection via ?http_auth= query parameter.

set_subdomain.description: Whether the role can request a custom subdomain via ?subdomain= query parameter.

set_allowed_ips.description: Whether the role can restrict tunnel access to specific IPs or CIDRs via ?allowed_ips= query parameter.

set_host.description: Whether the role can override the tunnel target host via ?host= query parameter.

set_tcp_port.description: Whether the role can request a raw TCP tunnel via ?tcp= query parameter.

set_mode.description: Whether the role can explicitly set the tunnel mode via ?mode= query parameter.
